headline: IRG Secures 1.38 Million Sq. Ft. Hyundai Translead Lease in Joliet, IL
summary: Industrial Realty Group, LLC (IRG), one of the country's largest owners of commercial and industrial properties, is proud to announce it has executed a long-term lease with Hyundai Translead, a subsidiary of Hyundai Motor Company.

headline: This Utility Could Be the Next Dividend Aristocrat. It May Return 10% This Year.
summary: Southern Co. is nearing eligibility for the Dividend Aristocrats index, and steady earnings growth plus a 3% yield could drive solid returns.

headline: Caterpillar insider to succeed retiring CFO
summary: Andrew Bonfield, who has been the construction equipment maker’s finance chief for eight years, will serve in an advisory role through Oct. 1.

headline: Assessing Caterpillar (CAT) Valuation After Strong Share Price Momentum And Record Sales
summary: Event context and recent share performance Caterpillar (CAT) shares recently closed at $771.58, with the stock showing positive moves over the past week, month and past 3 months, which has drawn fresh attention from investors evaluating industrial heavy equipment exposure. See our latest analysis for Caterpillar. Beyond the latest move, Caterpillar’s recent 6.5% 1 day share price return and 9.5% 30 day share price return sit alongside a very large 1 year total shareholder return. As a result,...

headline: Goldman Sachs, Caterpillar Lead DIA ETF Gains In Dow's Strongest Session In A Year
summary: The Dow Jones delivered its strongest daily performance in a year on April 8, surging more than 1,300 points.

headline: Caterpillar Taps Veteran Insider Kyle Epley As CFO
summary: Caterpillar (CAT) announces CFO Andrew Bonfield's retirement. Kyle Epley to succeed him in a planned transition. Get the full details here.
